heading: 1 BF528 - Applications in Translational Bioinformatics
text:
Welcome homepage BF528.Semester: Spring 2023Meeting time: Monday/Friday 10:10-11:55Location: EPC 208 ZoomOffice hours:
appointmentContents:Course ScheduleInstructorsOffice HoursCourse Values PoliciesThe objective course expose students topics technologies
used modern bioinformatics studies. course covers mix biological
computational topics, including:High throughput genomics techniques (microarrays, 2nd generation sequencing)Current high throughput sequencing assays (DNA-Seq, RNA-Seq, ChIP-Seq)Differential gene expression techniquesMicrobiome/metagenomics techniquesMetabolomicsProteomicsSystems, network, integrative biologyBasic linux cluster usagePython R scriptingComputational workflow replication strategiesGenomics data visualization techniquesBiological databasesThis highly hands-course, portion -class periods

genomics techniques organized structured group projects. Students
organized groups three four entire semester, 
work together replicate results published studies. tasks

interpretable formAnalyst: examine visualize processed data aid interpretationBiologist: connect processed data meaningful biological
interpretationEach group complete four projects course semester,
